summary: Tested P1 Features: B2B pricing at 76.52%, Admin Profile Tickets UI, B2B order status email. Fixed critical bug in retailers.py require_admin function that was checking wrong MongoDB collection. All 15 backend tests pass. Frontend Profile Tickets page fully functional.

fixed.issue: require_admin function checking 'admin_sessions' collection instead of using shared require_admin from dependencies.py
fixed.fix: Imported deps_require_admin from dependencies and wrapped it in local require_admin function
fixed.root_cause: Same bug as iteration_39 in admin_b2b.py - duplicated require_admin function used wrong collection

issues: Retailer names showing as 'Unknown' for some tickets - may need to include retailer_name when creating tickets

Profile Change Tickets Admin APIs.GET /api/retailers/admin/profile-change-: PASSED - Returns tickets with status_counts and pagination
PASSED - Returns ticket detail with retailer info
Profile Change Tickets Admin APIs.PUT /api/retailers/admin/profile-change-: PASSED - Updates ticket status with admin_notes
Profile Change Tickets Admin APIs.Authentication: PASSED - All endpoints properly protected with admin auth

B2B Order Status Email.Email template: VERIFIED - Includes order details, status icon, items table, admin note section
B2B Order Status Email.PUT /api/admin/b2b/orders/{id}/status: PASSED - Triggers email on status change

Admin Profile Tickets UI.Status cards: WORKING - Shows Pending(8), Under Review(0), Approved(1), Rejected(1)
Admin Profile Tickets UI.Filter by status: WORKING - Clickable status cards with data-testid
Admin Profile Tickets UI.Tickets table: WORKING - Shows retailer, change type, status, date, review button

action_items: Consider including retailer business_name when creating profile change tickets to avoid 'Unknown' display
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ B2B pricing correctly set at 76.52% of MRP
✓ Profile tickets API endpoints fully functional with admin auth
✓ Email notification integrated into B2B order status update
✓ Frontend Profile Tickets page has all required data-testid attributes
✓ Fixed require_admin in retailers.py to use shared auth function

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Profile Tickets page loads correctly, all elements present)

seed_data_creation: Existing profile change tickets used from database (8 pending, 1 approved, 1 rejected)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 features are working: B2B pricing at 76.52%, Admin Profile Tickets UI at /admin/profile-tickets, Email notifications on B2B order status change. Fixed same bug from iteration_39 where require_admin in retailers.py was checking wrong MongoDB collection (admin_sessions instead of user_sessions). The shared require_admin from dependencies.py should always be used.

rca_of_issue.bug_description: Profile change tickets API returning 401 'Invalid admin session' even with valid session token
rca_of_issue.root_cause: The require_admin function in retailers.py was checking 'admin_sessions' MongoDB collection, but admin login stores sessions in 'user_sessions' collection with user_id prefix 'admin_'
rca_of_issue.fix_applied: Imported and used the shared require_admin from dependencies.py which correctly validates sessions from user_sessions collection
rca_of_issue.verification: After fix, profile-change-tickets API returns 200 with proper ticket data
